extended_help:
Sell items from inventory for coins.

**Type options:**
- all — sell all except Legendary (safe)
- Common / Uncommon — instant sell
- Rare / Epic / Legendary — requires button confirmation

**Notes:**
- Items from /fish, /hunt, /explore can be sold
- Legendary is excluded from 'all' to prevent mistakes
- Use /inventory first to check total value

Tip: save Rare+ for /cook, sell Common/Uncommon for fast farming.
title: 💰 Sale
